title: Li Auto Q4 2024 Earnings Announcement
text: Li Auto will release its fourth quarter and full year 2024 financial results on March 14, 2025, before US markets open. Management will host an earnings call at 8:00 AM Eastern Time (8:00 PM Beijing time). The company delivered 158,696 vehicles in the final quarter, falling slightly short of expectations. This figure represented a 20.4% increase year-over-year and a 3.84% rise from Q3, yet it was below the lower end of its guidance range of 160,000 to 170,000 vehicles. Li Auto achieved strong annual performance with 500,508 total deliveries, marking a 33.1% year-over-year increase. The company had previously projected Q4 revenue between RMB 43.2 billion ($5.94 billion) and 45.9 billion yuan, reflecting growth of 3.5% to 10.0% compared to the prior year period. The company announced its first all-electric SUV model, the Li i8, on February 25, generating positive investor sentiment with Hong Kong-listed shares rising approximately 20% over three trading days.
